positive: A minimalist geometric pattern featuring stylized, interconnected celestial bodies (stars, crescent moons, planetary orbits). The design should use a limited, high-contrast palette of deep indigo blue, burnt orange, and cream white. The composition must be highly symmetrical and repeatable, suitable for seamless tiling on fabric. Incorporate clean, sharp lines and modern Art Deco influences, creating a mystic yet sophisticated aesthetic. Central focus on the harmonious flow of the repeating celestial geometry. Vectors, sticker art style, perfect symmetry, high detail, isolated on white background, digital print, screen print quality, flat lay, clean lines.
negative: blurry, messy, amateur, noisy, grain, text, signature, watermark, logo, trademark, cartoon, childish, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts
